nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord God of Israel, ‘I made a covenant with your forefathers in the day that I brought them out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage, saying,

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel: I myself made a covenant with your fathers when I brought them out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery, saying,

cnv.text: “耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：‘我把你們的列祖從埃及地為奴之家領出來的那日子，就和他們立了約，說：

ccb.text: “以色列的上帝耶和华说，‘我曾带领你们的祖先离开埃及，使他们不再受奴役，那时我与他们立约说，
